text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! I'm so happy, I could<n>explode! That was
the best festival<n>eveeer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop crying! Whoever thought<n>up gathering
all these Umadols into<n>one amusement park is a
certified<n>genius!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm hungry... I guess while I was<n>practicing my
light stick moves I<n>should have been eating. Ugh, I
really<n>need to get something in my belly...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Ohhhh, a figure as insanely<n>beautiful as that
can only be...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, don't we go to the same school?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Yooogkljsh! She's actually talking to<n>me! She
knows I exist! Eeeeek!)

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to watch my<n>spontaneous
photoshoot?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I only announced it a second ago...<n>How are fans
showing up already?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't believe my agency when<n>they told me
about the plan, but I have<n>to do my best,
regardless.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What? Huh? WHAAAT?!<n>Waitwaitwaitwait! I can't
process all<n>this information!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ahhhhh! I can't go eat at a time like<n>this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital takes<n>advantage of the
unexpected<n>opportunity and goes to support
another of her oshis. Thanks to the<n>unexpected
simp ses—high intensity<n>workout, she manages to
get back in<n>shape.
